entities.name: N. Chandrababu Naidu
entities.quote: Every family should have an entrepreneur. Rural Andhra Pradesh has immense talent and potential. Our goal is to create opportunities at the grassroots.
entities.quoteCtx: The Hindu — Andhra Pradesh · 25 May · 13:32 IST

entities.name: Rahul Gandhi
entities.quote: There has been massive tampering in the CBSE exam results, leaving millions of children across the country and their parents in shock. And Mr Modi? As always — no answers, no accountability, no shame.

entities.name: Akhilesh Yadav
entities.quote: The letters through which frightened BJP MLAs and MPs are trying to protect themselves are not public interest communications to their own government, but applications seeking tickets from the opposition for the upcoming elections after abandoning the sinking ship called BJP.

entities.name: Asaduddin Owaisi
entities.quote: This is a backdoor imposition of Hindu law on Muslims. On succession, inheritance and divorce, the Hindu principles are being imposed. Only Hindu culture is being protected, while Muslims have to comply with these so-called “uniform” rules.
